Dorothy performs the ritual of the Golden Cap, standing on different feet and reciting the magic words. The Winged Monkeys descend from the sky to obey her command to fly them to the Emerald City.
dorothy stands centered in the scarlet fields, preparing the ritual.
The group is lifted into the air by winged_monkeys.
